release.message:
EveLens 1.2.1
BUG FIX: • Plan training time was significantly underestimated — cerebral accelerator bonuses were being applied permanently to all skills in a plan, regardless of booster expiry. A 225-day plan would show as ~163 days. Training times now use base attributes + implants only, matching the EVE client exactly.
CHANGES: • Removed unreliable booster auto-detection from training calculations. Booster support will be redesigned with explicit user controls in a future release. • Added MaxEffectiveAttributePoints cap (32) with regression tests — no attribute can exceed base (27) + implant (5) in calculations.

EveLens 1.2.0
NEW FEATURES: • Drag-to-reorder in Plan Editor — grab skills, multi-select with Shift/Ctrl, prerequisite constraints enforced in real-time • Chain ribbons & timeline minimap — visual skill grouping by training goal with time distribution • Skill Farm Dashboard — full economics for extraction characters: Jita pricing, tax, profit projections, Omega sustainability • Recent Plans menu — quick access to your 5 most recently opened plans • Skill detail sidebar — double-click any skill to see description, unlocks, enabled items, and plan-to actions • Keyboard shortcuts — Ctrl+Q, Ctrl+W, Ctrl+N, Ctrl+M, Ctrl+, and more • Plan import/export overhaul — supports .emp, .txt, and EVE game clipboard format • Queue health on overview cards — color-coded status dots with at-a-glance queue health
IMPROVEMENTS: • Gmail-style mail view with inline reading pane • Employment history toggle between Timeline and List view • Skill level breakdown tooltip on character header • macOS install simplified to xattr-only method
BUG FIXES: • Plan import was creating empty plans — fixed across all import paths (thanks @TinkeringGoblin) • Skill browser no longer collapses after Plan To (thanks @NotmoGit) • Windows shutdown no longer hangs — 3-second timeout on save (thanks @Kickunio) • Market transaction item names no longer blank • Wallet journal no longer shows "Undefined" for new ESI ref types • Unicode ship names display correctly • App no longer hangs on quit with child windows open (macOS) • New Plan dialog keyboard focus works immediately (thanks @AnszaKalltiern)

EveLens 1.1.0
Character Skill Comparison, variable font scaling, queue health monitor, ESI token race fix, add character UX, manage groups redesign, blueprint browser, and more.
